name: qwen3_5_causal_conv1d_update_silu
reference:
# Source: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/blob/aad13b87ed59f2afcfaebc985f403301887a35fc/src/transformers/models/qwen3_5/modeling_qwen3_5.py#L545-L554
import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

def run(hidden_states, conv_state, weight, bias=None, activation=None):
    _, hidden_size, seq_len = hidden_states.shape
    state_len = conv_state.shape[-1]
    hidden_states_new = torch.cat([conv_state, hidden_states], dim=-1).to(weight.dtype)
    conv_state.copy_(hidden_states_new[:, :, -state_len:])
    output = F.conv1d(hidden_states_new, weight.unsqueeze(1), bias, padding=0, groups=hidden_size)
    output = F.silu(output[:, :, -seq_len:])
    return output.to(hidden_states.dtype)
description: Qwen3.5 decode-path depthwise causal conv1d update fused with SiLU. The conv_state input is updated in-place.
